query: SELECT id, authorName FROM author_profiles WHERE authorName REGEXP '^[a-z]' OR authorName IN ('active listening') OR authorName NOT REGEXP '^[A-Z][a-z]' ORDER BY authorName LIMIT 50;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute SELECT id, authorName FROM author_profiles WHERE authorName REGEXP '^[a-z]' OR authorName IN ('active listening') OR authorName NOT REGEXP '^[A-Z][a-z]' ORDER BY authorName LIMIT 50;
